default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's content strategy, SEO performance, and localization plans.](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [201 published articles, but recent decline in clicks/impressions (blog-specific)](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Transitioning from '/art' to '/blog' URL structure for better SEO value](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Exploring localization for Brazilian Portuguese and Spanish markets](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Need to refresh and update "best of" and trend articles for 2025](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [201 published articles to date](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Significant decline in clicks and impressions last week, specifically for blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Overall website metrics stable; issue isolated to blog content](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Decline mostly in low-quality clicks from India and Brazil](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [U.S. market performance remained strong](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### URL Structure Changes

  - [Transitioning from '/art' to '/blog' in article URLs](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Implementing 301 redirects from old to new URLs](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Change aims to leverage historical SEO value of '/blog' structure](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [May cause temporary discovery delays for new content](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [6 new tool pages launched, including Facebook ad fake video translator](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [84 use cases published; 44-45 new content ideas pending approval](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [Discussion on handling "cold traffic" articles (e.g., general translation topics)](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Decision: Keep high-traffic articles, optimize with stronger CTAs for conversion](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)

### Content Refresh and Updates

  - [Plan to update "best of" and trend articles for 2025](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Will include new competitors (e.g., Creative, Vantus) in refreshed lists](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Strategy to compound existing article authority by updating years and content](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)

### Localization Plans

  - [Focusing on Brazilian Portuguese market due to its importance](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Considering Spanish localization as well](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [Exploring creation of separate website entity or subdirectory (e.g., heygen.com/pt-br)](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Investigating localization tools: Localize.js, WigLox for potential use with Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Investigate cause of blog traffic decline](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Update URL structure to '/blog' for all articles](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Refresh and update "best of" and trend articles for 2025](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Select articles for yearly content updates](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Create draft for Portuguese/Spanish localization](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Mariana to send meeting recap and Holly-related items via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
  - [Daniel to explore compatibility of localization tools with Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/gq81G_xVvF1UDzY_NTzXizjvPjK5bYJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

action_items.description: Investigate recent traffic decline for blog articles, analyze cause of impression/click drop
Change URL structure from /article to /blog for all blog posts, implement redirects
Send Holly 44-45 new keyword ideas for use cases via Slack
Refresh "best of" and "top X" articles, update year to 2025, include new competitors
Identify articles suitable for yearly refresh, create list for future updates
Draft Portuguese and Spanish landing pages for new subdirectory (e.g. /pt-br), send to Mariana for review
